metadata.title: Semantic Notes Vault MCP
metadata.description: Semantic Notes Vault MCP Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite 警告：对字符串使用 decode() 已弃用。请参考 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: js files use non-utf8 encoding. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite 警告：js 文件使用了非 UTF-8 编码。更多信息请参见 https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: HTTP MCP 服务器端口（默认：3001）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically detect and warn about port conflicts
ast.target: 自动检测并警告端口冲突

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which network interface the mcp server listens on. Loopback only is recommended.
ast.target: MCP 服务器监听的网络接口。建议仅使用回环地址。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: IPv4/IPv6/hostname to bind to. Typing a loopback address auto-switches to loopback; typing a wildcard auto-switches to all interfaces.
ast.target: 要绑定的 IPv4/IPv6/主机名。输入回环地址会自动切换为回环模式；输入通配符会自动切换为所有接口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 接受的最低 TLS 版本

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ⚠️ dangerous: disable authentication entirely. Only use for testing or if you fully trust your local environment.
ast.target: ⚠️ 危险：完全禁用身份验证。仅用于测试或您完全信任本地环境时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable read-only mode - blocks all write operations (create, update, delete, move, rename)
ast.target: 启用只读模式 - 阻止所有写入操作（创建、更新、删除、移动、重命名）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude files and directories from mcp operations using .gitignore-style patterns
ast.target: 使用 .gitignore 风格的模式从 MCP 操作中排除文件和目录

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add "add to .mcpignore" option to file/folder context menus
ast.target: 在文件/文件夹上下文菜单中添加“添加到 .mcpignore”选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show mcp server status in the status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示 MCP 服务器状态

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable detailed debug logging in console
ast.target: 在控制台中启用详细的调试日志

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已为 HTTPS 生成自签名证书

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: MCP plugin: network binding now defaults to loopback only. If you previously accessed the MCP server from another machine on your LAN, open MCP settings → Network binding and switch to "All interfaces" or "Custom".
ast.target: MCP 插件：网络绑定现在默认为仅回环地址。如果您之前从局域网上的另一台机器访问 MCP 服务器，请打开 MCP 设置 → 网络绑定，并切换到“所有接口”或“自定义”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot disable HTTP when HTTPS is disabled. Enable HTTPS first.
ast.target: 当 HTTPS 被禁用时无法禁用 HTTP。请先启用 HTTPS。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot disable HTTPS when HTTP is disabled. Enable HTTP first.
ast.target: 当 HTTP 被禁用时无法禁用 HTTPS。请先启用 HTTP。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Restarting server with new protocol settings...
ast.target: 正在使用新的协议设置重启服务器...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: API 密钥已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: API key regenerated. Update your mcp clients with the new key.
ast.target: API 密钥已重新生成。请使用新密钥更新您的 MCP 客户端。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ⚠️ authentication disabled! Your vault is accessible without credentials.
ast.target: ⚠️ 身份验证已禁用！您的保险库无需凭据即可访问。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✅ Authentication enabled. API key required for access.
ast.target: ✅ 身份验证已启用。访问需要 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🔒 Read-only mode enabled. All write operations are blocked.
ast.target: 🔒 只读模式已启用。所有写入操作均被阻止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✅ Read-only mode disabled. All operations are allowed.
ast.target: ✅ 只读模式已禁用。所有操作均已允许。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✅ Context menu enabled - restart required for full effect
ast.target: ✅ 上下文菜单已启用 - 需要重启才能完全生效

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🔓 Context menu disabled - restart required for full effect
ast.target: 🔓 上下文菜单已禁用 - 需要重启才能完全生效

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: ❌ 无法在外部应用中打开

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 使用 TF-IDF 相关性评分（默认：根据查询类型自动检测）

ast.target: 搜索策略：auto（从查询检测）、filename（仅文件名）、content（全文）、combined（两者兼有）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 最大片段长度（字符数）（默认：300）

ast.name: description

ast.target: 返回的最大片段数（默认：5）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include file content in search results (slower but more thorough)
ast.target: 在搜索结果中包含文件内容（较慢但更全面）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Destination path for move/copy/combine operations. For combine: omit to return the combined content inline without writing a file
ast.target: 移动/复制/合并操作的目标路径。对于合并：省略则返回内联合并内容而不写入文件

ast.name: description

ast.target: 重命名操作的新文件名（不含路径）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to overwrite if destination exists (default: false)
ast.target: 如果目标存在是否覆盖（默认：false）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Split strategy: heading (by markdown headings), delimiter (by custom string), lines (by line count), size (by character count)

ast.name: description

ast.target: 用于 size 策略的每个文件最大字符数（默认：10000）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of file paths to combine
ast.target: 要合并的文件路径数组

ast.name: description
ast.target: 文件之间的内容分隔符（默认：\"\\n\\n---\\n\\n\"）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include source filenames as headers (default: false)
ast.target: 将源文件名作为标题包含（默认：false）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于连接的第一个文件路径

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于连接的第二个文件路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Concatenation mode: append to path1, prepend to path1, or create new file
ast.target: 连接模式：追加到 path1、前置到 path1 或创建新文件

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于 at_line 操作的行号

ast.name: description
ast.target: 用于 at_line 操作的插入模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Patch operation: append (add after), prepend (add before), or replace
ast.target: 补丁操作：append（之后添加）、prepend（之前添加）或 replace（替换）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Structure to target: heading (use :: for nesting), block (by ID), or frontmatter (field name)
ast.target: 要定位的结构：heading（使用 :: 进行嵌套）、block（通过 ID）或 frontmatter（字段名）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to search for and highlight
ast.target: 要搜索和高亮显示的文本

ast.name: description
ast.source: URL to fetch and convert to markdown
ast.target: 要获取并转换为 markdown 的 URL

ast.name: description
ast.source: Starting file path for graph operations
ast.target: 用于图操作的起始文件路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Target file path (for path finding operations)
ast.target: 目标文件路径（用于路径查找操作）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of nodes to return (default: 50)
ast.target: 返回的最大节点数（默认：50）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Include unresolved links in the results
ast.target: 在结果中包含未解析的链接

ast.name: description
ast.target: 遍历时跟踪反向链接（默认：true）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Follow forward links during traversal (default: true)
ast.target: 遍历时跟踪正向链接（默认：true）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Regex pattern to filter file names
ast.target: 用于过滤文件名的正则表达式模式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only include files with these tags
ast.target: 仅包含具有这些标签的文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only include files in this folder
ast.target: 仅包含此文件夹中的文件

ast.name: description
ast.source: Starting document path for search traversal
ast.target: 用于搜索遍历的起始文档路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Weight factor for tag connections (0-1, default: 0.8)
ast.target: 标签连接的权重因子（0-1，默认：0.8）

ast.name: description
ast.source: DQL query string. Examples: "LIST FROM #project WHERE status = \"active\"", "TABLE file.size, rating FROM \"Notes\" WHERE rating > 3 SORT file.mtime DESC", "TASK FROM #todo WHERE !completed", "CALENDAR file.ctime FROM \"Daily Notes\""
ast.target: DQL 查询字符串。示例：\"LIST FROM #project WHERE status = \\\"active\\\"\"、\"TABLE file.size, rating FROM \\\"Notes\\\" WHERE rating > 3 SORT file.mtime DESC\"、\"TASK FROM #todo WHERE !completed\"、\"CALENDAR file.ctime FROM \\\"Daily Notes\\\"\"

ast.name: description
ast.target: 查询格式（目前仅支持 DQL）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Source filter for pages. Examples: "folder/path" (folder), "#tag" (tag), "[[Note Name]]" (backlinks), "" (all pages)
ast.target: 页面的源过滤器。示例：\"folder/path\"（文件夹）、\"#tag\"（标签）、\"[[Note Name]]\"（反向链接）、\"\"（所有页面）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Base configuration object with name, source, properties, and views
ast.target: 包含名称、源、属性和视图的基础配置对象

ast.name: description
ast.source: Name of the view to retrieve

ast.name: description
ast.source: Array of filter objects with property, operator, and value
ast.target: 包含属性、运算符和值的过滤器对象数组

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort options with property and order (asc/desc)
ast.target: 包含属性和顺序（asc/desc）的排序选项

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pagination options with page and pageSize
ast.target: 包含 page 和 pageSize 的分页选项

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在结果中包含笔记内容

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specific properties to include in results
ast.target: 要在结果中包含的特定属性

ast.name: description
ast.source: Current vault status, file counts, and metadata
ast.target: 当前保险库状态、文件计数和元数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: Active MCP sessions and connection pool statistics
ast.target: 活动的 MCP 会话和连接池统计信息

ast.name: description
ast.source: Complete DQL syntax guide with examples, functions, and best practices
ast.target: 完整的 DQL 语法指南，包含示例、函数和最佳实践

ast.name: error
ast.source: No query provided for fragment search
ast.target: 未为片段搜索提供查询

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Please provide a search query. Examples: "keyword", "tag:#example", "file:name.md"

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Try simplifying your query or check if the vault is accessible
ast.target: 尝试简化您的查询或检查保险库是否可访问

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行上出现意外的 block-seq-ind 与键

ast.name: message
ast.source: must be equal to one of the allowed values

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate is not valid yet or has expired.
ast.target: 证书尚未生效或已过期。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate has an unsupported critical extension.
ast.target: 证书具有不支持的关键扩展。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate keyUsage or basicConstraints conflict or indicate that the certificate is not a CA. If the certificate is the only one in the chain or isn't the first then the certificate must be a valid CA.
ast.target: 证书的 keyUsage 或 basicConstraints 冲突或表明该证书不是 CA。如果证书是链中唯一的证书或不是第一个，则该证书必须是有效的 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate is missing basicConstraints extension and cannot be used as a CA.
ast.target: 证书缺少 basicConstraints 扩展，不能用作 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate basicConstraints indicates the certificate is not a CA.
ast.target: 证书的 basicConstraints 表明该证书不是 CA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书基本约束路径长度约束违规。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 应用程序拒绝了该证书。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected message. Received TLS record out of order.
ast.target: 意外消息。收到的TLS记录顺序错误。

ast.name: message
ast.source: TLS version change is disallowed during renegotiation.
ast.target: 在重新协商期间不允许更改TLS版本。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid Certificate message. Message too short.
ast.target: 无效的证书消息。消息过短。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid key parameters. Only RSA is supported.
ast.target: 无效的密钥参数。仅支持RSA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的证书请求。消息过短。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的证书验证。消息过短。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书验证中的签名错误。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的服务器完成消息。长度无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No server certificate provided. Not enough security.
ast.target: 未提供服务器证书。安全性不足。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 收到无效的更改密码规范消息。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 完成消息中的验证数据无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not decrypt record or bad MAC.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot initiate handshake as a server.
ast.target: 无法作为服务器发起握手。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Path is required and must be a string
ast.target: 路径是必需的且必须是字符串

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的正则表达式语法

ast.name: message
ast.source: Regular expression has exponential complexity (potential ReDoS)
ast.target: 正则表达式具有指数级复杂性（潜在的ReDoS）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Local neighborhood retrieved. You can explore connections or expand the search.
ast.target: 已检索本地邻域。您可以探索连接或扩展搜索。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Statistics retrieved. You can explore the actual links or find connected nodes.
ast.target: 已检索统计数据。您可以探索实际链接或查找连接的节点。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Backlinks retrieved. You can explore these files or analyze their connections.
ast.target: 已检索反向链接。您可以探索这些文件或分析它们的连接。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Forward links retrieved. You can explore these referenced files.
ast.target: 已检索正向链接。您可以探索这些引用的文件。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Session expired or not found. Start a new session by sending an initialize request without a session ID.
ast.target: 会话已过期或未找到。请通过发送不带会话ID的初始化请求来启动新会话。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Bad Request: a session is required. Send an initialize request first.
ast.target: 错误请求：需要会话。请先发送初始化请求。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No buffered content found. Use edit_vault_window first.
ast.target: 未找到缓冲内容。请先使用edit_vault_window。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No content provided and no buffered content found.
ast.target: 未提供内容且未找到缓冲内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reconfigure: switch the bind address below to Loopback, or enable HTTPS.
ast.target: 重新配置：将下方绑定地址切换为环回，或启用HTTPS。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No custom address entered yet — server will fall back to loopback (127.0.0.1) until you enter one.
ast.target: 尚未输入自定义地址——服务器将回退到环回地址 (127.0.0.1)，直到您输入一个。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 📝 No certificate found - will auto-generate on server start
ast.target: 📝 未找到证书 - 将在服务器启动时自动生成

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: the API key is stored in the plugin settings file. Anyone with access to your vault can read it.
ast.target: 注意：API密钥存储在插件设置文件中。任何有权访问您保险库的人都可以读取它。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Supports both bearer token (recommended) and basic authentication.
ast.target: 支持Bearer令牌（推荐）和基本身份验证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save patterns in .mcpignore file before reloading
ast.target: 在重新加载前将模式保存在.mcpignore文件中

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ warning: authentication is disabled. Your vault is accessible without credentials!
ast.target: ⚠️ 警告：身份验证已禁用。您的保险库无需凭据即可访问！

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🔌 Plugin integrations: none detected (install dataview for additional functionality)
ast.target: 🔌 插件集成：未检测到（安装dataview以获取附加功能）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 📊 Obsidian://vault-info - 实时保险库元数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🔄 Obsidian://session-info - active mcp sessions and statistics
ast.target: 🔄 Obsidian://session-info - 活动MCP会话和统计信息

ast.name: text
ast.source: Download the bundle, drop it onto Claude desktop, and paste these values in the install prompt.
ast.target: 下载该捆绑包，将其拖放到Claude桌面，并在安装提示中粘贴这些值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Advanced — other mcp clients, multi-vault, custom bundles
ast.target: 高级 — 其他 MCP 客户端、多保险库、自定义捆绑包

ast.name: text
ast.source: For cline, continue, custom integrations, or multi-vault setups — add this to the client's mcp config file. One entry per vault if you run several Obsidian instances on different ports:
ast.target: 适用于 Cline、Continue、自定义集成或多保险库设置 — 请将此添加到客户端的 MCP 配置文件中。如果您在不同端口上运行多个 Obsidian 实例，请为每个保险库添加一个条目：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Clone the plugin repo and run `node scripts/make-mcpb.mjs`. It prompts for a display name, url, and api key, then writes a custom-named .mcpb you drop into claude desktop — one-click install per vault, no fields to type at install time.
ast.target: 克隆插件仓库并运行 `node scripts/make-mcpb.mjs`。它会提示输入显示名称、URL 和 API 密钥，然后生成一个自定义命名的 .mcpb 文件，您可以将其放入 Claude Desktop — 每个保险库一键安装，安装时无需输入任何字段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Thanks for being an Obsidian enthusiast!
ast.target: 感谢您成为 Obsidian 爱好者！

ast.name: warning
ast.source: Using filename-only search due to advanced search failure
ast.target: 由于高级搜索失败，正在使用仅文件名搜索
